inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 OCF $5,292M minus capex $291M, divided by 494M diluted shares (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 GAAP free cash flow; 2024 included ~$8.5B Thrive acquisition cash outflow (not in FY2025 run rate)

bear.notes: Soft commercial insurance pricing, consulting slowdown, multiple compression to ~18x free cash flow

base.notes: Mid-single-digit organic revenue; spot ~15.5x P/FCF re-rates modestly to 22x in year 10

bull.notes: Hard market persists, Mercer and Oliver Wyman accelerate, buybacks continue

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Operating compounder; fiduciary float and interest income are not owner cash in Lawrence base

growth_explanation.mechanism: Brokerage and consulting fee growth from insured exposure, policy rate, and Mercer/Oliver Wyman project demand; margin from scale and mix.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 segment revenue growth; management organic commentary in earnings 8-Ks
